event.description:
Join amazing speakers for Jupyter at Scale, Deep Learning & More - Agenda:
7:00pm - Networking
7:15pm - Jeremy Nilmeier, Data Scientist, on his new O'Reilly book & on Call for Code https://callforcode.org/
7:20pm - Kevin Bates, Senior Software Engineer, on Jupyter Enterprise Gateway https://jupyter-enterprise-gateway.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
7:40pm - Luciano Resende, Data Science Platform Architect, on Deep Learning Experience in Jupyter Notebooks and FfDL (Fabric for Deep Learning https://developer.ibm.com/code/open/projects/fabric-for-deep-learning-ffdl/ )
8:00pm - Va Barbosa, Developer Advocate, on learning how to create charts, graphs & maps
8:15pm - Susan Malaika Jupyter Sprint Day (free) on Sat Aug 25 https://github.com/jupyter/jupyter/wiki/JupyterCon-2018-Sprint-Day -
8:20pm - Networking
8:45pm - The End

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Jupyter at Scale - Deep Learning & More

meetup_name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC
